title: The Apothecary Diaries Custom GUI Pack
description: The Apothecary Diaries Custom GUI Pack
body: **![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/BJyAF7U.jpeg)** ### **Introduction:** This is a **GUI-only resource pack** themed around the anime *“The Apothecary Diaries.”* You can **freely use it with other resource packs**—just place it on top of the one you're currently using. This pack features a **red & green color palette**, with custom textures across the GUI, including containers and the hot bar. I’ve taken this opportunity to experiment with **unique images for each interface** to enhance immersion and style. In future updates, I may add alternative color themes such as **blue & yellow**—feel free to make suggestions! If you encounter any bugs, please report them—I’ll fix them as soon as I can. Community Engagement: Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, participate in anime discussions, and enter monthly giveaways for Discord Nitro! [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ] 🔗 Visit our relaunched website for more content, packs, and updates! ### **Images & Feature Highlights:** * **HUD** ![](https://i.imgur.com/Q5Gitbf.png) * **Shulker Box** ![](https://i.imgur.com/Rado3Zh.png) * **Enchantment Table** ![](https://i.imgur.com/c9b8i8j.png) * **Large Chest** ![](https://i.imgur.com/Hm3shkl.png) * **Dispenser** ![](https://i.imgur.com/sNownUk.png) * **Furnace** ![](https://i.imgur.com/BaKWbeG.png) * **Loom** ![](https://i.imgur.com/gLpkscc.png) * **Crafting Table** ![](https://i.imgur.com/VlL6eDY.png) * **Smoker** ![](https://i.imgur.com/5dTnCh9.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listar-mc.net/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
